title: आत्माको गीत
content:
रातको शान्तिमा,
जब विचार सपनाको संसारमा घुमिन्छन्,
मैले अनुभव गरें शब्दहीन शान्तिको,
भावनाहरु राती मसीले रङ्ग पाएका।

title: Code and Dreams
content:
Lines of logic, verses of hope,
Building bridges between reality and imagination,
Every function a prayer,
Every line a step towards tomorrow.
